name: Salad Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, mix flour, sugar, dry mustard, and salt.
2. Stir in the vinegar and water; add the eggs.
3. Cook, stirring constantly until thick.
4. Add butter; chill.
5. You may want to thin this with a little cream when ready to use, as it does get pretty thick.
